title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic GTM Product Manager Jared Sires built CLAFTS (Claude Drafts), an AI email assistant powered by the Claude API and Claude Code that helps sales reps draft customer replies in their own voice. The tool addresses the administrative burden of customer communication for sales teams.
